_note: Standard-mode (API equivalent of web-UI 'v3') enemy regen on rolfihenriquez. size=64, view=side, detail=high, humanoid. 8 concurrency limit so the worker fires the 16 pending as the first 8 finish.

pending.name: Skeletal Warhorse v3
pending.description: Zombie warhorse humanoid, rotted horse-headed undead warrior with bony equine skull poking through decayed flesh, ribbed half-skeletal torso, battered cavalry tabard, holding a broken cavalry lance, hooves cracked and bloody, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Carrion Spider v3
pending.description: Zombified carrion spider humanoid, hunched rotting figure with eight chitinous spider legs sprouting from a putrid hooded torso, eight glowing red eyes under the hood, venom dripping from mandibles, exposed muscle around the leg sockets, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Phantom Knight v3
pending.description: Phantom-zombie knight, half-rotted corpse in translucent cyan-glowing ghostly plate armor, helm with glowing eye slits and peeling decayed flesh showing through, holding a spectral longsword, ethereal trailing cape over rotted shoulders, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Wailing Wraith v3
pending.description: Wailing wraith-zombie, translucent half-decayed corpse floating in shredded burial shroud, mouth opened wide in a perpetual scream showing rotted teeth, hollow black eye sockets, skeletal hands reaching forward with peeling dead skin, pale cyan glow around the rotting form, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Zombie Knight v3
pending.description: Corrupted zombie legionnaire, fully rotting soldier in tarnished bronze armor with chipped rusted sword, decayed face with peeling green-gray skin and exposed jawbone, tattered legion tabard soaked in blood, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Zombie Berserker v3
pending.description: Zombie berserker raging revenant, shirtless rotting muscle-bound corpse with bulging black veins and exposed ribs, twin rusted cleavers raised overhead, jaw permanently open in a roar, blood-streaked rotted torso, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Shield Bearer v3
pending.description: Shield-bearer undying zombie defender, hulking armored rotting corpse hunched behind a massive iron tower-shield, spiked mace in his off-hand, faceless visored helm with glowing red slit, blood-streaked armor over decayed flesh, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Zombie Mage v3
pending.description: Rotting zombie mage, decayed sorcerer in moth-eaten purple robes, withered hand extended summoning a black necrotic orb, half-skeletal half-rotted face with glowing violet eye, bone-tipped staff, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Grave Channeler v3
pending.description: Grave channeler zombie summoner, gaunt rotting corpse hunched in a deep crouch with both palms slammed against the ground, bone shards bursting from earth around him, ragged dark robes, glowing cyan rune-markings carved into peeling flesh, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Soul Leech v3
pending.description: Soul leech zombie, emaciated translucent half-rotted ghoul-like figure with elongated tendril arms, floating slightly off the ground, glowing cyan soul-energy leaking from its open ribcage and rotted mouth, tattered shroud over decayed flesh, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Rotwolf v3
pending.description: Zombified rotwolf humanoid, bony wolf-headed undead with bare wolf skull poking through rotted scalp, sinewy decayed body with exposed ribs, claws elongated, blood-matted gray fur scraps clinging to peeling flesh, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Bone Bear v3
pending.description: Bone bear zombie hulking horror, massive humanoid bear-headed undead with bony bear skull and rotted ursine flesh, ribbed half-skeletal torso with shredded fur, two massive bony paw-fists raised, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Possessed Corpse v3
pending.description: Possessed zombie corpse vessel of shadow, gaunt humanoid rotting corpse leaking black smoky shadow-tendrils from eyes mouth and chest, tattered purple robes, elongated shadow-claws growing from rotted fingers, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Grave Digger v3
pending.description: Grave digger zombie husk, hunched rotting corpse in dirt-caked tattered overalls, mud-streaked decayed face with hollow eyes, gripping a rusted iron shovel, dirt and worms falling from peeling skin, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Plague Monk v3
pending.description: Plague monk zombie ritual spreader, hooded rotting zombie monk in soiled gray-green robes, holding a chain censer wreathed in sickly green plague smoke, bone-mask with green glow over decayed face, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror

pending.name: Necromancer v3
pending.description: Zombie necromancer corpse animator, towering hooded half-skeletal half-rotted necromancer in deep purple robes covered in occult runes, glowing purple eye sockets in a decayed face, raising a bone-tipped staff with a floating purple orb, summoning shadow-mist around rotted feet, in the same painterly dark-fantasy pixel art style as the V1 BoneWake roster (Bloodmage, Bone King, Frost Witch, Pyromancer, Korvan, Samurai) — gritty mature gory survival horror
